response.global_summary: A video segment from the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert by Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis, featuring a solo vocal performance by Takanashi Kiara.

scenes.description: Crowd holding glowsticks in a dark venue. The screen displays the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert title.
Takanashi Kiara performs a song on stage with backup dancers. The stage lighting is intense.
